description: EXTRACT returns double precision (f64) for year and month parts
name: date_extract
query_sql:
-- @name ExtractDateParts
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM occurred_at) AS yr, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM occurred_at) AS mo FROM events
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE events (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, occurred_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL);
